high.summary: Dynamic tools now emit canonical TurnItem::DynamicToolCall lifecycle, while app-server v2 dispatches client DynamicToolCall requests from canonical item starts and ignores mapped legacy request/response events.
evidence: openai/codex commit f659eb12bc8cecb976d92db192d9b2983c8053ff message: feat(core): emit canonical dynamic tool call items (#31298)
codex-rs/app-server/src/bespoke_event_handling.rs ignores deprecated DynamicToolCallRequest/Response for app-server v2 and dispatches client request from canonical item starts
codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/dynamic.rs emits DynamicToolCallItem started/completed lifecycle with status, content_items, success, error, and duration
local_targets: app-server v2 DynamicToolCall request dispatch invariants

high.summary: Release signing now uses per-binary macOS entitlement profiles; Intel V8-linked binaries receive allow-jit plus allow-unsigned-executable-memory while the Responses API proxy keeps the narrower entitlement set.
evidence: openai/codex commit f363ed70cc1c6e2cae15fc1b8711f7e0d7b96cf1 message: fix(release): add missing Intel V8 signing entitlement (#30953)
.github/workflows/rust-release.yml signs and verifies binaries against per-binary entitlement files and Mach-O architecture
local_targets: fail-closed binary selector constraints for generated release adapters

high.summary: ExternalAuth now resolves and refreshes CodexAuth directly instead of returning the removed ExternalAuthTokens wrapper, changing local type projections for external API-key and ChatGPT auth flows.
evidence: openai/codex commit a3f8b0b33284054133474e7b1cc5fa7600221d97 message: refactor: make ExternalAuth return CodexAuth (#31355)
codex-login auth trait signatures change from ExternalAuthTokens to CodexAuth
AuthManager validates external ChatGPT auth mode/account state during refresh and ignores non-API-key auth from external API-key providers
local_targets: auth adapter type projections that still model ExternalAuthTokens
external bearer and ChatGPT refresh fixtures
account/workspace validation constraints for externally supplied ChatGPT auth

notes.summary: Upstream added tests for plugin skill namespace inheritance, nested manifest precedence, invalid nested manifest fallback, and symlink scan-root behavior. No implementation behavior changed in this commit.
